title: Ukrainian drones strike Russian oil facilities some 1,500 km away
summary: April 30 (Reuters) - Ukraine's Security Service, the SBU, said on Thursday its drones struck an oil refinery deep into Russia near the city of Perm, marking a second consecutive attack on oil
contents:
## Article

**Source**: Yahoo News - World (via Reuters)
**Published**: 2026-04-30T21:20:37.000Z
**URL**: https://www.yahoo.com/news/articles/ukrainian-drones-strike-russian-oil-110249424.html

### Headline

Ukrainian drones strike Russian oil facilities some 1,500 km away

### Reported Details

April 30 (Reuters) - Ukraine's Security Service, the SBU, said on Thursday its drones struck an oil refinery deep into Russia near the city of Perm, marking a second consecutive attack on oil

April 30 (Reuters) - Ukraine's Security Service, the SBU, said on Thursday its drones struck an oil refinery deep into Russia near the city of Perm, marking a second consecutive attack on oil

## Reporting Context

Yahoo News aggregates international wire-service dispatches with editorial filtering. Cross-referencing with original wire reports (Reuters, AP, AFP) supports verification. This entry reflects an article surfaced and timestamped within the OSINT collection window. Independent confirmation through additional outlets remains advisable for high-impact claims.
